projects.name: Dailenge
projects.description: A React Native app built in Expo. Designed with focus on neurodivergent users looking for a fun way to challenge themselves and build productivity.
projects.synopsis: My first app built in Expo with React Native, GraphQL. Main feature is picking random challenges to complete during the day.

projects.name: Delta Kanban
projects.description: Organize your tasks with an interactive Kanban board with draggable and droppable cards and columns.
projects.synopsis: My first fullstack project, featuring a Kanban board with draggable cards and columns. Built with React, Express.js and DnD-Kit.

projects.name: Kollin Landing Page - Personal
projects.description: Individual renovation of a landing page for Kollin based on a wireframe.

projects.name: Kollin Landing Page - LiA
projects.description: Renovated landing page of Kollin as part of my internship.

projects.name: Mormor Dagny's Bageri
projects.description: A web application designed to digitalize data and order management for a bakery.
